consumer-installed spex dashboard --port 15173 --api-port 18787: startup logs 'serving monorepo build' (in-layout shipped dist — expected wording updated) + '[gateway] dashboard on http://localhost:15173'; GET / = bundled index (<title>SpexCode</title>, hashed /assets/index-Dq7kmaey.js → 200 text/javascript); /some/deep/route → 200 SPA fallback; /api/board 200 json with serve up, 502 with serve down; listener 127.0.0.1-only per ss

PORT=28787 npm run api from repo root; serve child (index.ts, pid traced via supervisor on :28787) env shows npm_config_prefix=/home/jeffry/.nvm/versions/node/v22.21.0 — the real nvm global root, not $repo/spec-cli; no --prefix hijack
